controls.evidence: MCPO POST endpoints require Authorization: Bearer $MCPO_API_KEY.
controls.recommendation: Rotate MCPO_API_KEY after public demos or suspected exposure.

controls.evidence: ruflo_status reports production_enabled=false and disallowed runtime services.
controls.recommendation: Keep daemon, swarm, hooks, memory, autopilot, Claude MCP autostart, and Codex MCP autostart disabled.

controls.evidence: Current MCPO tools expose explicit time/status/repo/Ruflo status-plan-packet endpoints.
controls.recommendation: Do not import arbitrary shell, Docker, filesystem, or GitHub write tools into Open WebUI.

controls.evidence: Paperclip API write attempts returned 401 for agent runs, preventing automated mutation.
controls.recommendation: Keep manual disposition flow until run-scoped API auth is intentionally restored and reviewed.

controls.evidence: V1.7B backup archive and non-destructive restore test completed on VPS.
controls.recommendation: Schedule backup cadence and move archives off-host after v1.7D.

controls.evidence: V1.7C stack-health monitor returned ok=true on VPS.
controls.recommendation: Add cron/email or Slack alerting only after webhook secret handling is approved.

controls.evidence: Kimi WebBridge is documented as v1.7E evaluation only.
controls.recommendation: Use a separate Chrome profile and low-risk UI-only test before adoption.

secret_rotation.when: after demos, team changes, or suspected exposure
if Open WebUI auth/session compromise is suspected
if Hermes endpoint key is exposed
if provider usage anomalies or exposure occur
